name: Crisp Oatmeal Treasures
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour, baking soda, and salt into a bowl.
2. Add sugars, shortening, egg, and vanilla to the dry ingredients.
3. Beat until smooth, about 2 minutes.
4. Stir in oats and chopped nuts.
5. Shape dough into a roll and wrap tightly in waxed paper.
6. Chill several hours or overnight.
7. Cut dough into 1/4-inch slices.
8. Place on ungreased cookie sheets.
9. Bake at moderate oven temperature (350°F) for 10 to 12 minutes.
